lint.detail: 48 errors, 10 warnings. Pre-existing baseline was 47 errors, 8 warnings (documented in AGENTS.md). Foundation work added 1 new error (no-useless-escape in adapters/cursor/parse-stdout.ts) and 2 new warnings (react-refresh/only-export-components in ActivityCharts.tsx, ThirdwebProvider.tsx). All new errors are non-blocking.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Helper functions (parseCommaArgs, parseEnvVars, parseEnvBindings) duplicated across 6 adapter build-config files. Should be extracted to src/adapters/utils.ts.
openclaw-gateway config-fields uses raw HTML <select> instead of Shadcn Select component.
pi-local build-config assigns extraArgs/args as raw strings instead of parsing through parseCommaArgs() like other adapters.
Lint error: no-useless-escape in src/adapters/cursor/parse-stdout.ts line 9.
Manual IssueRow type defined instead of reusing Database types or domain.ts IssueRecord type.
No loading/error UI states shown when Supabase query is pending or fails.
roleLabels and adapterLabels maps hardcoded locally. Should be extracted to shared constants if reused by other features.
Potential crash: getCreatedAt() returns empty string for missing dates; new Date('').toISOString() throws RangeError.
reports_to 'none' sentinel: string 'none' sent to Supabase instead of null when user selects 'None (root agent)'. Would fail at runtime if FK constraint exists.
STATUS_COLORS duplicated in Agents.tsx and AgentDetail.tsx.
AgentDetailPage tests only assert document.body exists — effectively no-op assertions.
Supabase error response not checked in useWalletAddressSync — errors silently lost.
Non-deterministic company row selection (no ORDER BY) when syncing wallet address.
Orphan routes (/org-chart, /design-guide) remain in App.tsx but removed from sidebar navigation.
Dual data sources (useAgencyData at 30s + new hooks at 15s) for badge counts vs footer, can momentarily be out of sync.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md to document ThirdwebProvider/AuthGate auth wrapping pattern and src/providers/ directory convention.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Use Database types from src/integrations/supabase/types.ts for all Supabase queries. Do not define local TypeScript interfaces that duplicate generated table row types. For domain-specific aliases, reference src/features/cockpit/lib/domain.ts.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features kanban-board-port, agent-management-pages, and dashboard-components-port all defined local interface types (IssueRow, AgentRow, AgentDetailRow) instead of using the Database types. Same pattern repeated across 3 independent workers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Place shared display constants (STATUS_COLORS, roleLabels, adapterLabels) in src/lib/constants.ts. Do not duplicate constants across page files.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: STATUS_COLORS duplicated in Agents.tsx and AgentDetail.tsx. roleLabels duplicated in OrgChart.tsx and would likely be needed by agent list pages. Multiple workers independently created the same constants.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Place shared React hooks in src/hooks/. Place feature-specific hooks (used by only one feature) in src/features/{feature}/lib/ or src/features/{feature}/hooks/.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Navigation hooks (useLiveRunCount, usePendingApprovalCount, useSidebarAgents) placed in src/hooks/ while useAgencyData lives in src/features/cockpit/lib/. No documented guidance on which location to use.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update synthesis-worker skill TDD requirement (step 2) to clarify: 'TDD applies to features with testable behavior (components, hooks, utilities). For config/setup features (dependency installs, .env creation, SQL migrations, type definitions), skip TDD and document why in skillFeedback.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-setup worker correctly skipped TDD for a setup task and noted it in skillFeedback. Multiple reviewers flagged the TDD deviation as a skill gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update synthesis-worker skill verification step (step 5) to acknowledge AGENTS.md's 'Known Pre-Existing Issues' for lint: 'Run npm run lint. The command will exit non-zero due to pre-existing errors. Verify that YOUR new files have no lint errors by checking the output. Do not skip the lint step.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: 4 of 8 workers skipped npm run lint entirely. AGENTS.md says lint will fail with 47 pre-existing errors, but the skill doesn't acknowledge this — workers saw the conflict and skipped lint rather than parsing the output.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when agent-browser interactive verification is required vs optional in synthesis-worker skill step 5. Currently says 'manually verify with agent-browser' but multiple workers skipped it with no issues.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: At least 4 of 8 workers skipped interactive browser verification. All features still passed review. The step may be better framed as 'recommended for UI features' rather than required.

rejectedObservations.observation: Git repo root at home directory documentation gap
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — AGENTS.md 'Known Pre-Existing Issues' section already documents this.

rejectedObservations.observation: openclaw-gateway uses raw <select> instead of Shadcn Select
rejectedObservations.reason: Too specific and isolated to one file. Non-blocking code issue already captured. Not a systemic pattern requiring guidance update.

rejectedObservations.observation: SectionPage scope exceeded feature contract by implementing all sections
rejectedObservations.reason: One-off occurrence due to file needing to be created fresh. Not a systemic issue — the worker correctly created the required file that was missing.
